zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Jane Stanley Warburton於1463年出生在威爾士丹比爾霍爾特時，她的父親William Stanley31歲，母親Elizabeth de Hopton37歲。她於1489年2月10日與Sir John Warburton在威爾士丹比爾霍爾特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1525年在英國英格蘭爾阿爾 霍爾享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Jane Stanley Warburton于1463年出生在威尔士丹比爾霍爾特时，她的父亲William Stanley31岁，母亲Elizabeth de Hopton37岁。她于1489年2月10日与Sir John Warburton在威尔士丹比爾霍爾特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1525年在英国英格兰爾阿爾 霍爾享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Jane Stanley Warburton was born in 1463, in Holt, Denbighshire, Wales, her father, William Stanley, was 31 and her mother, Elizabeth de Hopton, was 37. She married Sir John Warburton on 10 February 1489, in Holt, Denbighshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1525, in Arley Hall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Jane Stanley Warburton est née en 1463, à Holt, Denbighshire, Galles, son père, William Stanley, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Hopton, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Warburton le 10 février 1489, à Holt, Denbighshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1525, à Arley Hall, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Jane Stanley Warburton è nata il nel 1463 nel Holt, Denbighshire, Galles, sua padre, William Stanley, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Hopton, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Warburton il 10 febbraio 1489, nel Holt, Denbighshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1525, nel Arley Hall, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Jane Stanley Warburtonが1463年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアホルトで生まれた時，父William Stanleyは31歳，母Elizabeth de Hoptonは37歳であった。1489年2月10日にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアホルトでSir John Warburtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1525年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアルリー ハルで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Jane Stanley Warburton(이)가 1463년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 홀트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Stanley(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Hopton(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1489년 2월 10일 웨일스 덴비그h실르 홀트에서 Sir John Warburton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1525년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 알리 홀에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Tower of London, Middlesex, England, Uni: тоуир оф лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Jane Stanley Warburton родилась в 1463 г. в местности холт, денбаишир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени William Stanley было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Hopton, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Warburton 10 февраля 1489 г. в местности холт, денбаишир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1525 г. в местности арли холл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.
